case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,500.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,500.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA LOVE, JAMES H.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,500.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY J DAVID NICK ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JAMES H. LOVE. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
